---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug or unexpected behavior in BlueLock Crypto Tracking
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Description
A clear description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Enter '...'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior
What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior
What actually happened. Include error messages, screenshots, or console output if applicable.

## Environment
- **OS:** (e.g. Windows 11, Windows 10)
- **Python version:** (run `python --version`)
- **Browser:** (e.g. Chrome 124, Firefox 126)
- **App version:** (found in the About tab)

## Additional Context
Any other information that might help diagnose the issue.

---
> BlueLock Crypto Tracking is privacy-first and self-hosted.
> Please do **not** include any wallet addresses, seed phrases, or private keys in bug reports.
